title: MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY — TEMPLATE & GUIDE
subtitle: Force Production of Documents Emily/Berry Are Withholding

elements.element: Statement that good faith conference was attempted per MCR 2.313(A)(1)
elements.note: MUST certify you tried to resolve without court intervention

elements.element: Specific discovery requests that were served
elements.note: List each interrogatory/document request by number

elements.element: Date discovery was served and response deadline
Description of deficient or missing responses
elements.note: Be specific about what was not provided
Explain why each item matters to custody/fraud claims
Costs of bringing motion + evidentiary sanctions

items.item: All text messages between Emily and Berry regarding L.D.W. or Andrew

items.reason: Fitness assessment for household contact with L.D.W.

items.item: All communications between Berry and Barnes (P55406)
items.reason: Conspiracy evidence — Berry is NOT Barnes's client, no privilege

items.item: Medical records for L.D.W. since separation
items.reason: Best interest factor analysis + potential neglect evidence
Child support calculation + potential hidden assets

items.item: Photos/videos of L.D.W. since Aug 2025 suspension
items.reason: Child welfare assessment during denial of father contact

sanctions.sanction: MCR 2.313(B)(2)(a) — Order establishing facts as proven
sanctions.effect: Court deems disputed facts true in Andrew's favor

sanctions.sanction: MCR 2.313(B)(2)(b) — Refuse to allow disobedient party to support/oppose claims
sanctions.effect: Emily cannot use defenses she refused to disclose
Andrew wins on all claims — nuclear option

sanctions.sanction: MCR 2.313(A)(5) — Reasonable expenses including attorney fees
sanctions.effect: Andrew recovers costs of bringing motion (pro se hourly rate)
Jury/court may infer withheld evidence would be unfavorable to Emily

sections.title: GOOD FAITH CONFERENCE CERTIFICATION
sections.template: I, Andrew James Pigors, hereby certify that on [DATE], I attempted in good faith to resolve this discovery dispute with Emily A. Watson by [METHOD — email/letter/in-person] as required by MCR 2.313(A)(1). Despite my efforts, Defendant has [refused to respond / provided incomplete responses / failed to produce documents]. This motion is therefore necessary to obtain Court intervention.
methods: Send written request via email and certified mail to Emily at 2160 Garland Drive, Norton Shores, MI 49441
Document date sent and response (or lack thereof)
Wait minimum 7 days for response before filing motion
Keep copies of ALL correspondence as exhibits to the motion
